title: Immersive Portals Mods
description: A few mods to improve the experience with the Immersive Portals mod
body:
This modpack adds the [Immersive Portals](https://modrinth.com/mod/immersiveportals) mod which can make the portals to the End or the Nether seamless and see-through. You can also create customized portals of different sizes that do not lead to another dimension. The [Pehkui](https://modrinth.com/mod/pehkui) mod is also installed to make different sized portals you bigger or smaller as you walk through. For perfomance, [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium) is added. If you want to play with friends, the [Essential Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/essential) is also included.


![Infinite Hallway](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/40b182ce4809dacb68d919087a08ed76f2aa8517.png)
